intent: List image records in non-source custody roots that are not present in data/assets-src/sprites by exact content, so Studio/runtime/reference drift is reviewed before archive or promotion work.
source_rule: data/assets-src/sprites remains the source authority. Non-source drift is not proof of source truth and is not an archive candidate by itself.
no_move_rule: Read-only report. Promote, register, rebuild, prune, or archive only through a separately approved lane.

root_summaries.label: Codex Studio import
root_summaries.review_action: Decide whether this Studio image should be promoted into data/assets-src/sprites, registered as Studio-only reference, or removed from the working surface.

root_summaries.label: Android packaged assets
root_summaries.review_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.

root_summaries.label: Incoming dropped Studio bundle
root_summaries.review_action: Keep as original drop evidence. Promote a specific file only through a source-registration lane.

root_summaries.label: Codex poster outputs
root_summaries.review_action: Keep as poster/reference output unless a human selects a concrete image for source promotion.

root_summaries.label: Debug client dist atlas
root_summaries.review_action: Reproduce from the build lane or prune as distribution output; do not use it as source authority.

root_summaries.label: Debug client public atlas
root_summaries.review_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.

root_summaries.label: Game built assets
root_summaries.review_action: Review manually before custody, archive, or cleanup claims.

required_next_gate: For codex_studio drift, decide promote-to-source, Studio-only reference, or remove-from-working-copy.
For debug-client dist drift, prove build reproduction before pruning distribution files.
For poster/reference drift, keep as reference output unless a specific image is promoted into source custody.
Never archive or delete game source based only on non-source drift.
